action_set_definitions.name: get_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current elapsed time in the simulation to monitor the 180-minute operational limit.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation_time
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation clock by a specific number of minutes. This is used to wait for requested mutual aid to arrive or for patients to complete transit.

minutes.description: The number of minutes to advance the simulation clock.

action_set_definitions.name: get_hospital_census
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current number of patients remaining at Oak Creek Healthcare categorized by acuity level (Red, Yellow, Green) and the current Bed_Match_Rate.

action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_risks
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the status of active fire zones and road network integrity to determine safe evacuation paths.

action_set_definitions.name: get_bed_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the current available bed capacity at safe receiving facilities for a specific medical acuity level.

acuity_level.description: The medical priority level to check capacity for.

action_set_definitions.name: request_bed_mutual_aid
action_set_definitions.description: Formally requests additional receiving bed capacity from the regional healthcare coalition if the current inventory is insufficient for the census.

required_quantity.description: The number of additional beds needed.

action_set_definitions.name: get_transport_fleet
action_set_definitions.description: Provides the status and count of available transport assets currently on-site or dispatched.

action_set_definitions.name: request_cct_mutual_aid
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a Patient Movement Request (PMR) for additional Critical Care Transport (CCT) units to handle ventilator-dependent patients.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_evacuation
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the movement of a group of patients to a specific destination using chosen transport assets.

state_description.active_fires: A list of zones currently affected by fire, including intensity levels (1-5) and spread rates.
state_description.evacuation_teams: Status and GPS coordinates of all available emergency response units.
state_description.shelter_status: Mapping of shelter IDs to their current capacity, occupancy, and resource levels (food/water).
state_description.road_network_integrity: Status of primary and secondary evacuation routes (Open, Blocked, Congested).
state_description.weather_conditions: Current environmental factors including wind_direction, wind_speed, and humidity.
state_description.simulation_time: The current elapsed time in the simulation (ISO 8601 or relative minutes).
